noteList.text: Once payment is confirmed, tickets will be issued within 1 day

According to the airline's regulations, the tickets you have booked must be used in the order of the flight segments. Otherwise, the ticket fare, fuel surcharges, and government taxes will be recalculated based on the actual itinerary. If the recalculated amount exceeds the amount you have already paid for the tickets, you will be required to pay the difference. Additionally, any unused flight segments on the tickets will be considered invalid and cannot be used. The final decision will be subject to the approval of the operating carrier.
Book worry-free. What you see is what you pay.
Each piece cannot exceed 40 × 30 × 15 cm in size. Total dimensions (length + width + height) of each piece cannot exceed 85 cm.
It must be placed under the seat in front of you.

formatted.sizeDesc: Overall size limit (length + width + height) per bag: 85 cm.

noteList.text: 1 piece per person, 7 kg per piece.
Each piece cannot exceed 56 × 36 × 23 cm in size.
2 pieces per person, 23 kg per piece.
Overall size limit (length + width + height) per bag: 158 cm.

formatted.sizeDesc: Overall size limit (length + width + height) per bag: 158 cm.

noteList.text: Taipei: Baggage will be checked through.

For cancellations, an additional US$18.90 service fee will be charged by the ticket agency. Service fee will be charged per passenger. Note: For bookings where only taxes are refundable, the tax refund amount shown is after deducting service fees. For cancellations, the airline's non-refundable taxes and fees of US$28.10/person will be deducted. For cancellations of partially used tickets, the ticket fare and tax of the used segment will be deducted. Subject to the airline regulations.

title.text: US$239.00 per adult ticket will be charged for cancellations made before the departure of the first segment. Cancellation are not permitted after the departure of the first segment. For cancellations of partially used tickets, the ticket fare and tax of the used segment will be deducted. Subject to the airline regulations. For cancellations, an additional US$18.90 service fee will be charged by the ticket agency. Service fee will be charged per passenger. Note: For bookings where only taxes are refundable, the tax refund amount shown is after deducting service fees. For cancellations, the airline's non-refundable taxes and fees of US$28.10/person will be deducted.

noteList.text: For date/time changes, an additional US$18.90 service fee will be charged by the ticket agency. Service fee will be charged per passenger. When date/time changes result in a new ticket price which is higher than the original ticket price, the difference must be paid. According to the airline's policy, once a ticket has been changed, the change fee that has already been paid is non-refundable if any further changes are made.

title.text: US$132.00 per adult ticket will be charged for date/time changes within the same class made before the departure of the first segment. US$309.00 per adult ticket will be charged for date/time changes within the same class made after the departure of the first segment. When a date/time change results in a flight ticket price difference, both the change fee and the price difference will be charged. For date/time changes, an additional US$18.90 service fee will be charged by the ticket agency. Service fee will be charged per passenger.

noteList.text: If your flight is changed due to external factors (for example, if your flight is delayed or canceled) and you need to change your flight, please refer to the latest airline policies.

Change fees (within the same class) are charged when passengers apply for ticket changes voluntarily, and are only valid for ticket changes within the same class. These fees are airline fees and are not charged by Trip.com. Flight ticket changes may also incur additional charges due to differences in plane ticket prices.

The ticket policy is subject to the rules listed below, and these might differ from policies listed on the airline's website. Any cancellation or change requests must be made through Trip.com platforms or to our customer support.

flagInfoList.content: Each airline has different regulations on special baggage (such as musical instruments and sports equipment). Therefore, for baggage other than regular backpacks and suitcases, we recommend checking the baggage regulations on the airline's website or contacting our customer support before traveling.

tagList.content: Once payment is confirmed, tickets will be issued within 1 day

descriptionList: Each passenger can make one free cancellation if the ticket is canceled before the departure of the first flight segment. For more details, see the terms & conditions below.

Each passenger can get 1 free ticket change if the ticket is changed before the first departure in the itinerary. Trip.com will cover the change fee and service fee, but the passenger must pay any fare difference between the new and original flights.

noticeList.notice: Valid before departure of the first flight. Not transferable to changed flights.

displayPolicyList.title: Air Flexibility added

noteList.text: Once payment is confirmed, tickets will be issued within 45 minutes
*Service information is provided by the airline. Please refer to the airline's website for details regarding service policies.

According to the airline's regulations, the tickets you have booked must be used in the order of the flight segments. Otherwise, the ticket fare, fuel surcharges, and government taxes will be recalculated based on the actual itinerary. If the recalculated amount exceeds the amount you have already paid for the tickets, you will be required to pay the difference. Additionally, any unused flight segments on the tickets will be considered invalid and cannot be used. The final decision will be subject to the approval of the operating carrier.
Book worry-free. What you see is what you pay.
Each piece cannot exceed 40 × 30 × 15 cm in size. Total dimensions (length + width + height) of each piece cannot exceed 85 cm.
It must be placed under the seat in front of you.

noteList.text: Taipei: Baggage will be checked through.

For cancellations, the airline's non-refundable taxes and fees of US$28.00/person will be deducted. For cancellations of partially used tickets, the ticket fare and tax of the used segment will be deducted. Subject to the airline regulations.

title.text: US$177.00 per adult ticket will be charged for cancellations made before the departure of the first segment. US$309.00 per adult ticket will be charged for cancellations made after the departure of the first segment. For cancellations of partially used tickets, the ticket fare and tax of the used segment will be deducted. Subject to the airline regulations. For cancellations, the airline's non-refundable taxes and fees of US$28.00/person will be deducted.

noteList.text: When date/time changes result in a new ticket price which is higher than the original ticket price, the difference must be paid. According to the airline's policy, once a ticket has been changed, the change fee that has already been paid is non-refundable if any further changes are made.

title.text: US$62.00 per adult ticket will be charged for date/time changes within the same class made before the departure of the first segment. US$194.00 per adult ticket will be charged for date/time changes within the same class made after the departure of the first segment. When a date/time change results in a flight ticket price difference, both the change fee and the price difference will be charged.

noteList.text: If your flight is changed due to external factors (for example, if your flight is delayed or canceled) and you need to change your flight, please refer to the latest airline policies.

Change fees (within the same class) are charged when passengers apply for ticket changes voluntarily, and are only valid for ticket changes within the same class. These fees are airline fees and are not charged by Trip.com. Flight ticket changes may also incur additional charges due to differences in plane ticket prices.
Change and cancellation fees are charged according to the policies listed on the airline's website.

Each airline has different regulations on special baggage (such as musical instruments and sports equipment). Therefore, for baggage other than regular backpacks and suitcases, we recommend checking the baggage regulations on the airline's website or contacting our customer support before traveling.

According to the airline's regulations, the tickets you have booked must be used in the order of the flight segments. Otherwise, the ticket fare, fuel surcharges, and government taxes will be recalculated based on the actual itinerary. If the recalculated amount exceeds the amount you have already paid for the tickets, you will be required to pay the difference. Additionally, any unused flight segments on the tickets will be considered invalid and cannot be used. The final decision will be subject to the approval of the operating carrier.
Book worry-free. What you see is what you pay.
Each piece cannot exceed 40 × 30 × 15 cm in size. Total dimensions (length + width + height) of each piece cannot exceed 85 cm.
It must be placed under the seat in front of you.

noteList.text: 1 piece per person, 7 kg per piece.
Each piece cannot exceed 56 × 36 × 23 cm in size.
2 pieces per person, 23 kg per piece.

noteList.text: Taipei: Baggage will be checked through.

For cancellations, the airline's non-refundable taxes and fees of US$28.00/person will be deducted. For cancellations of partially used tickets, the ticket fare and tax of the used segment will be deducted. Subject to the airline regulations.

title.text: US$44.00 per adult ticket will be charged for cancellations made before the departure of the first segment. US$133.00 per adult ticket will be charged for cancellations made after the departure of the first segment. For cancellations of partially used tickets, the ticket fare and tax of the used segment will be deducted. Subject to the airline regulations. For cancellations, the airline's non-refundable taxes and fees of US$28.00/person will be deducted.

noteList.text: When date/time changes result in a new ticket price which is higher than the original ticket price, the difference must be paid. According to the airline's policy, once a ticket has been changed, the change fee that has already been paid is non-refundable if any further changes are made.

title.text: Date/time changes within the same class are free if made before the departure of the first segment. US$88.00 per adult ticket will be charged for date/time changes within the same class made after the departure of the first segment. When a date/time change results in a flight ticket price difference, both the change fee and the price difference will be charged.

noteList.text: If your flight is changed due to external factors (for example, if your flight is delayed or canceled) and you need to change your flight, please refer to the latest airline policies.

Change fees (within the same class) are charged when passengers apply for ticket changes voluntarily, and are only valid for ticket changes within the same class. These fees are airline fees and are not charged by Trip.com. Flight ticket changes may also incur additional charges due to differences in plane ticket prices.
Change and cancellation fees are charged according to the policies listed on the airline's website.

flagInfoList.content: Passengers with a standard frequent flyer membership will earn approximately 9,156 miles/points.

Each airline has different regulations on special baggage (such as musical instruments and sports equipment). Therefore, for baggage other than regular backpacks and suitcases, we recommend checking the baggage regulations on the airline's website or contacting our customer support before traveling.
